NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to take photos or videos you choose to record, such as capturing where items are kept in a drawer, cabinet, or room.
NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used to select photos or videos you choose to upload, such as importing photos of cabinets, boxes, or rooms to record item locations.
NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Used to record audio in videos you take, such as describing item locations while filming a cabinet or drawer.
